findings.message: The `isNewIn(product, referenceDate?)` contract is underspecified relative to existing filter behavior. `useXaListingFilters` computes newness against a derived reference timestamp (max product createdAt), not strictly Date.now; calling isNewIn(product) in TASK-03 (line 245) risks badge/filter inconsistency.

Representative image selection is defined as first image from first product in category, which can produce avoidable placeholders when that first product lacks media even if later products have images. Selection should prefer first product with a valid image URL.
Non-goals includes Cart empty state styling while TASK-01 explicitly implements cart empty state styling, which is internally contradictory and can confuse execution scope.
